items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding quiet hours.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior during quiet hours (no SMS from 10 PM to 8 AM). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or results related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system adheres to the quiet hours policy. As such, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
